summary: Generate mode: Tested Closed Trades History Feature. Created 23 new backend tests (all passing) and 13 new frontend E2E tests (all passing). Verified GET /api/trades?status=CLOSED returns all required fields (id, pnl, pnl_percent, price_entry, price_exit, opened_at, closed_at, close_reason). German UI translations confirmed working (Geschlossene Trades, Trefferquote, Gesamtgewinn, etc.). Trade detail modal shows P&L, ROI, entry/exit prices, timestamps. P&L color coding (green for profits, red for losses) verified.

minor.issue: Returns 400 when max_parallel_trades limit reached - expected behavior but may cause test failures if at capacity

endpoints_verified.GET /api/trades?status=CLOSED: PASS - Returns 86 closed trades with all required fields
endpoints_verified.GET /api/trades?status=OPEN: PASS - Returns 4 open trades with all required fields
endpoints_verified.GET /api/portfolio: PASS - Returns win_rate (35%), closed_trades (86), total_pnl, open_trades

features_verified.closed_trades_list: PASS - Backend returns list of closed trades with pnl, pnl_percent, timestamps, close_reason
features_verified.active_trades_list: PASS - Backend returns list of open trades with price_current, price_entry
features_verified.portfolio_stats: PASS - Win rate, closed trades count, total P&L all correctly calculated
features_verified.trade_detail_modal: PASS - Shows P&L, ROI, entry/exit prices, timestamps, close reason
features_verified.german_ui_labels: PASS - All labels in German (Geschlossene Trades, Aktive Trades, Trefferquote, etc.)
features_verified.pnl_color_coding: PASS - Green for profits (.text-neon-green), red for losses (.text-neon-red)
features_verified.closed_trades_stats_summary: PASS - Shows total trades, total profit, total loss, win rate, avg profit, avg loss

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 86 closed trades and 4 open trades
context_for_next_testing_agent: Closed trades history feature fully tested. 23 backend API tests verify trades and portfolio endpoints. 13 frontend E2E tests verify German translations, P&L display, trade detail modal, and color coding. Some pre-existing backend tests for auto-trading config values are outdated (scan_interval changed from 3s to 2s) - these are not bugs.
